prestazioni: Forced induction upgrade via HKS GT-SS Supercharger kit (2GR-FKS engine, 8.5 psi base boost, 400+ WHP on 93 octane) with integrated HKS LEGAMAX intercooler and custom 3.5" mandrel-bent aluminum piping to reduce pressure drop by 12%

Full bolt-on exhaust system: Tomei 304 stainless steel 70mm titanium-tip cat-back (ES350-specific fitment) with GReddy Revolution RS front pipe and Berk Technology catted downpipe (200-cell metallic substrate) to retain OBD-II compliance while reducing backpressure by 38%

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (ES350-specific valving, 12-position compression/rebound damping) paired with Cusco front strut tower bar (22mm hollow section) and Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm, 3-position stiffness) to eliminate body roll in F Sport's 0.88g skidpad limit
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS ES350 widebody conversion (OEM+ fitment, 30mm front/40mm rear fender flares) with custom carbon fiber side skirts and rear diffuser (Aeroflow Dynamics, 3-piece modular design for track use)

Vorsteiner V-FF 107 20x9.5" ET35 front / 20x11" ET45 rear forged wheels (matte gunmetal finish) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (255/30/20 front, 295/25/20 rear) with custom wheel spacers (15mm front, 25mm rear) for aggressive flush fitment

Full carbon fiber exterior package: Seibon dry carbon fiber hood (ES350-specific, 8.5kg weight reduction), Varis Arising II front lip (painted in Grigio Nimbus matte), and custom 3D-printed carbon fiber mirror caps (AeroCatch quick-release mounts) to reduce drag coefficient from 0.28 to 0.25
